_meta.purpose: Source-of-truth prompts for dark-mode menu product images. Same items as public/menu/ but with a moody dark aesthetic. Edit subjects here, then regenerate via the imagegen skill + batch API.
_meta.generator: node scripts/batch-dark-menu.mjs (Gemini batch API, 50% off standard pricing)

shared.style: Photorealistic moody café product photography. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, very dark background.
shared.backdrop: Dark wooden surface with visible grain. Very dim warm amber bokeh lights barely visible in the background. Almost black surroundings.
shared.composition: Subject fills 70% of the frame and is clearly lit from above. Square 1:1 composition at 1K resolution.
shared.constraints: No logos, no text, no watermark, no hands, no people. Shallow depth of field.

latte.name: Latte
latte.subject: A beautifully crafted latte in a white ceramic cup with delicate latte art rosette pattern, steam rising gently. Cup fills approximately 70% of the frame.

iced-latte.name: Iced Latte
iced-latte.subject: A tall glass of iced latte with ice cubes, caramel-toned espresso swirling through cold milk, topped with a thin foam layer.

americano.name: Americano
americano.subject: A small white ceramic cup of hot americano, deep black coffee with a thin golden crema layer on top, steam rising.

iced-americano.name: Iced Americano
iced-americano.subject: A tall glass of iced americano with large ice cubes and deep black coffee, condensation on the outside of the glass.

cappuccino.name: Cappuccino
cappuccino.subject: A cappuccino in a white ceramic cup with a thick dome of velvety foam and a light dusting of cocoa powder on top.

mocha.name: Mocha
mocha.subject: A mocha in a white ceramic cup with rich chocolate and espresso layered beneath thick steamed milk, topped with cocoa dust.

espresso.name: Espresso
espresso.subject: A small white espresso cup with a double shot of espresso, dark rich liquid with a golden-red crema, on a small saucer.

flat-white.name: Flat White
flat-white.subject: A flat white in a small white ceramic tulip cup with smooth microfoam and a simple tulip latte art pattern.

sig-latte.name: Signature Latte
sig-latte.subject: A signature latte in a white ceramic cup with intricate rosette latte art and a hint of golden syrup drizzle on top.

matcha-latte.name: Matcha Latte
matcha-latte.subject: A matcha latte in a white ceramic cup with vibrant green matcha swirled into steamed milk, creating a beautiful gradient.

thai-tea.name: Thai Milk Tea
thai-tea.subject: A glass of Thai milk tea with vivid orange-amber tea layered over thick condensed milk, ice cubes visible, bright color.

oolong.name: Oolong Latte
oolong.subject: A cup of oolong latte with golden-brown tea and steamed oat milk, subtle earthy tones, light foam on top.

chamomile.name: Chamomile
chamomile.subject: A clear glass mug of chamomile tea with golden yellow liquid, dried chamomile flowers floating, soft steam rising.

jasmine-green.name: Jasmine Green
jasmine-green.subject: A delicate cup of jasmine green tea with pale golden-green liquid, small jasmine flower petals floating on the surface.

earl-grey.name: Earl Grey Latte
earl-grey.subject: An earl grey latte in a white cup with purple-grey steamed milk and a dried bergamot slice or lavender sprig garnish.

croissant.name: Croissant
croissant.subject: A golden flaky croissant on a small dark ceramic plate, freshly baked with crispy laminated layers and golden-brown crust.

pain-au-choc.name: Pain au choc
pain-au-choc.subject: A pain au chocolat on a dark ceramic plate, golden pastry with visible chocolate filling peeking from the ends.

banana-bread.name: Banana Bread
banana-bread.subject: A thick slice of moist banana bread on a dark ceramic plate, golden-brown crust with visible banana bits inside.

muffin.name: Muffin
muffin.subject: A blueberry muffin with a domed golden top and crumb topping on a dark ceramic plate, blueberries visible in the cake.

kouign-amann.name: Kouign-amann
kouign-amann.subject: A kouign-amann pastry on a dark ceramic plate, caramelized golden-brown sugar crust with flaky buttery layers.

lemonade.name: Lemonade
lemonade.subject: A tall glass of fresh lemonade with ice cubes, bright yellow liquid, a lemon slice on the rim, condensation on the glass.

sparkling.name: Sparkling Water
sparkling.subject: A glass of sparkling water with ice, tiny bubbles rising through crystal clear water, a lemon wedge on the side.

fresh-orange.name: Orange Juice
fresh-orange.subject: A glass of freshly squeezed orange juice, vivid orange color, small pulp bits visible, condensation on the glass.

cold-brew.name: Cold Brew
cold-brew.subject: A jar or glass of cold brew coffee with ice, very dark concentrated coffee, a paper straw, condensation on glass.

iced-matcha.name: Iced Matcha
iced-matcha.subject: A tall glass of iced matcha latte, vibrant green matcha over ice and milk creating a beautiful gradient from green to white.

dalgona-coffee.name: Dalgona Coffee
dalgona-coffee.subject: A dalgona coffee in a clear glass, creamy whipped coffee foam on top of cold milk, coffee swirl pattern on the foam.

brown-sugar-latte.name: Brown Sugar Latte
brown-sugar-latte.subject: A brown sugar latte with caramel-brown sugar syrup drizzled on the inside of the glass, espresso poured over ice and milk.

lavender-latte.name: Lavender Latte
lavender-latte.subject: A lavender latte in a white ceramic cup, light purple-tinted steamed milk with a fresh lavender sprig garnish on top.

hojicha-latte.name: Hojicha Latte
hojicha-latte.subject: A hojicha latte in a white ceramic cup, warm caramel-brown roasted green tea latte with smooth steamed milk.

rose-oat-latte.name: Rose Oat Latte
rose-oat-latte.subject: A rose oat latte in a white ceramic cup, pale pink latte with a dried rose petal garnish and smooth oat milk foam.
